title: Dance Party (Capstone)
goal: Put everything together: a Repeat that runs an If, with different Do blocks for yes and no.

steps.prompt: Start with a Repeat set to 5.
Put an If / else inside the Repeat.
Drop a compare block in the yes-or-no slot (5 bigger than 3 works fine).
Put one Do in the If, a different Do in the else.
Press play and watch your party!

canned_hints: You know all these blocks — just stack them!
Repeat is the outside shell. Everything else goes inside.
No wrong answer here — make it yours.

success_check.message_missing: The capstone wants a Repeat, an If, and a Do — all in one.
